# Test Review: `lib/features/ai/model/` and `test/features/ai/model/`

**Scope:** All implementation files under `lib/features/ai/model/` and their corresponding test files under `test/features/ai/model/`.

*Generated by automated test-quality review (static analysis)*

---

## File inventory

---

## File size / split opportunities

- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_model_form_state_test.dart` — 367 lines for 138 lines of impl is a large ratio but not itself problematic. No split needed; the structure (validators → form state → toAiConfig) is clean.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_usage_test.dart` — 387 lines; most length comes from the thorough manual + Glados tests. No split needed; the file is well-structured.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `lib/features/ai/model/ai_config.dart` — 193 lines holding 5 distinct union variants plus 2 enums. Consider whether `AiConfigInferenceProfile` and `AiConfigSkill` warrant their own focused files as the model continues to grow; at the current size this is informational only.

---

## Test quality improvements

- [ ] **[HIGH]** `test/features/ai/model/ai_config_test.dart` (96 lines) — tests only the `AiConfigInferenceProfile.pinnedHostId` field. The remaining four union variants (`inferenceProvider`, `model`, `prompt`, `skill`) have no JSON round-trip tests at all. For a Freezed sealed class whose `.fromJson` path is exercised by the DB layer, missing coverage here means a deserialization regression would only surface in integration tests.
- [ ] **[HIGH]** `lib/features/ai/model/modality_extensions.dart` — no test file exists. The file has two extension methods (`displayName`, `description`) on `Modality`. Both require a `BuildContext`, so widget tests are appropriate. The expected pattern (from `inference_provider_extensions_test.dart`) is a single `testWidgets` block that pumps a `Builder` and iterates all `Modality.values`.
- [ ] **[MED]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_error_test.dart:83–90` — the `InferenceErrorTypeExtension.getTitle` test uses a for-loop over all error types but only checks `expect(title, isNotEmpty)`. It does not verify any specific localized strings. At minimum, add one spot-check per type to ensure the switch arm is wired correctly (e.g. `expect(InferenceErrorType.networkConnection.getTitle(context), contains('network'))` or a non-empty non-exception assertion).
- [ ] **[MED]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_provider_extensions_test.dart` — the `icon` test table at lines 11–33 omits `InferenceProviderType.mlxAudio` (which returns `Icons.memory_rounded`) and the `requiresDataUriForAudio` extension property (line 98 of impl) is not tested at all. Add both.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/realtime_transcription_event_test.dart` — `RealtimeTranscriptionDone` and `RealtimeTranscriptionError` are plain Dart classes with no JSON serialisation; the tests are constructor/getter checks. This is acceptable for non-serialised event types. Consider noting that if `fromJson`/`toJson` is ever added these should be round-trip tested.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/resolved_profile_test.dart` — the `skillAssignments` field is never checked: none of the equality tests includes profiles with non-empty `skillAssignments`. Since equality uses `ListEquality`, a profile with `skillAssignments: [a]` and one with `skillAssignments: []` should be unequal; this case is missing.

---

## Generative (Glados) testing opportunities

- [ ] **[HIGH]** `lib/features/ai/model/ai_config.dart` — all five union variants are Freezed models with `fromJson`/`toJson`. A Glados property test for each variant's JSON round-trip (`encode → decode → equal`) would catch serialisation regressions across the entire model graph (including nested `SkillAssignment` lists, nullable fields, and enum deserialization). The `AiConfigInferenceProvider`, `AiConfigModel`, and `AiConfigPrompt` variants have the most fields and the highest regression risk.
- [ ] **[MED]** `lib/features/ai/model/inference_model_form_state.dart` — the `MaxCompletionTokens` validator (lines 42–51) has a non-trivial boundary: `int.tryParse`, `<= 0`, and decimal detection. A Glados property confirming that any valid positive integer string passes, any non-integer string fails, and any `<= 0` integer string fails would be more thorough than the current 7 explicit cases.
- [ ] **[MED]** `lib/features/ai/model/inference_provider_form_state.dart` — `BaseUrl` validator (lines in impl) accepts empty or valid http/https URLs and rejects others. A Glados property over arbitrary strings would ensure no unexpected panics and that the invariants hold at scale.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `lib/features/ai/model/inference_usage.dart` — already has an excellent Glados merge test (line 261 of test, `numRuns: 180`). The JSON round-trip is also embedded inside that property (`InferenceUsage.fromJson(merged.toJson()) == merged`). No additional Glados coverage needed.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `lib/features/ai/model/skill_assignment.dart` — tiny model; existing static round-trip tests are sufficient. Glados would add negligible value.

---

## Coverage / missing-behavior gaps

- [ ] **[HIGH]** `lib/features/ai/model/modality_extensions.dart` — completely untested (0 tests). Since the extension methods are used throughout the UI, a regression would be silent until a UI widget test exercised the specific locale path.
- [ ] **[HIGH]** `lib/features/ai/model/ai_config.dart` — `AiConfigModel`, `AiConfigPrompt`, and `AiConfigSkill` JSON round-trips are untested. In particular, `AiConfigPrompt.defaultVariables` (nullable `Map<String,String>`) and `AiConfigSkill.contextPolicy` / `useReasoning` are prone to silent JSON key mismatches.
- [ ] **[MED]** `lib/features/ai/model/inference_provider_extensions.dart` — `requiresDataUriForAudio` (line 98) is tested nowhere. Only `InferenceProviderType.alibaba` returns `true`; the property should be checked for both the positive case (alibaba → true) and a negative case (any other → false).
- [ ] **[MED]** `lib/features/ai/model/resolved_profile.dart` — `skillAssignments` field equality is not exercised. Also, `thinkingModel`, `imageRecognitionModel`, `transcriptionModel`, and `imageGenerationModel` are all optional `AiConfigModel?` fields; no test verifies equality when these differ.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `lib/features/ai/model/inference_error.dart` — `InferenceErrorType` enum count check at line 49 (`values.length == 7`) is a fragile count assertion. If a new error type is added, the test fails with an unhelpful message. Replace with `containsAll(InferenceErrorType.values)` or an exhaustive switch coverage check.

---

## Test execution speed opportunities

- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_provider_extensions_test.dart` — uses `testWidgets` for both `displayName` and `description` methods because they need a `BuildContext`. These are short widget tests but they run the full Flutter test harness. No improvement possible without changing the production API to accept a message bundle rather than a `BuildContext` directly.
- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/features/ai/model/inference_error_test.dart` — the `getTitle` test pumps a full widget tree just to get a `BuildContext`. Consider refactoring alongside similar tests (e.g. `inference_provider_extensions_test.dart`) so all localisation tests share a single `makeTestableWidget` pump and collect all results in one pass, rather than pumping once per file.
- [ ] **[LOW]** No `Future.delayed`, `sleep`, or real timers found in any model test file. Fake-time policy is not violated.

---

## Summary

- **1 completely missing test file**: `modality_extensions.dart` (27 lines, two localisation extension methods) has zero coverage.
- **1 very partial test file**: `ai_config_test.dart` covers only 1 of 5 union variants; the other 4 variants have no JSON round-trip tests.
- **3 Glados candidates**: `AiConfig` union variants (JSON round-trip), `MaxCompletionTokens` validator (boundary), `BaseUrl` validator (arbitrary URL strings).
- **2 weak test patterns**: `inference_error_test.dart` loops over types asserting only `isNotEmpty`; `inference_provider_extensions_test.dart` omits the `mlxAudio` icon and `requiresDataUriForAudio` property.
- **No fake-time violations** detected in any model test.
- **No speed wins available** beyond the minor shared-pump suggestion for localisation tests.
